items.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
items.summary: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accu...
